app.title: Show HN: Perfect Bluetooth MIDI for Windows
app.author: mayerwin
app.description: Windows CLI tool for testing and configuring Bluetooth MIDI
proposed_tests: Run the tool on a Windows system and verify MIDI connectivity
Test the CLI interface for usability and syntax correctness
Check the tool's documentation and examples for completeness
